concepts.headline: Nine hundred stars in 48 hours.
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open source legal AI, launched and the community responded immediately.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout. The hero stat '900+' rendered in DM Mono at 96px weight 700, left-aligned at 80px padding. Below it, the headline in Inter 48px weight 600 at -0.03em letter-spacing. Subtext in Inter 17px weight 400 color #555, 28px below headline. A thin 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) sits above the eyebrow label 'MIKE / OPEN SOURCE LEGAL AI' in DM Mono 12px uppercase. Right side of canvas holds a particle dot network: scattered gray circles 2-6px at 0.10 opacity connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, occupying the right 40% of canvas. FLYWHEEL wordmark watermark at bottom-right, 140px, opacity 0.03. 65% negative space preserved.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. Hero stat #111. Headline #111. Subtext #555. Eyebrow label #888. Accent bar #d7c8af. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.10 opacity. Warm sand box-shadow rgba(215,200,175,0.25) on the stat block.
concepts.reasoning: The 900+ stars figure is the single most striking data point and warrants a hero stat treatment. Left-anchored hero with DM Mono numerics communicates the momentum without clutter. The particle dot network on the right evokes the growing community connections and extensions being built on Mike, aligning with Flywheel's signature motif.

concepts.headline: An open source legal AI, starred 900 times.
concepts.subtext: Mike launched 48 hours ago. Already forked 200 times, extended with CourtListener, and running locally for secure legal workflows.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored layout on a warm off-white #faf9f6 surface. Top-left eyebrow in DM Mono 11px uppercase letter-spacing 0.07em: 'MIKEOSS.COM / OPEN SOURCE'. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) 120px wide fades to transparent below the eyebrow. Headline in Inter 52px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.03em, left-aligned, spanning 58% of canvas width. Subtext in Inter 17px weight 400 color #555 below headline with 32px gap, max-width 520px. Three small square stat tiles in DM Mono 14px weight 500 arranged horizontally below subtext: '900+ STARS', '200+ FORKS', '48 HRS'. Each tile has a 1px #e5e5e5 border and 0px border-radius. Right 38% of canvas is pure negative space with faint particle dot scatter at 0.08 opacity. Flywheel brand mark bottom-left in #888 at 11px uppercase.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6. Headline #111. Subtext #555. Eyebrow #888. Accent bar #d7c8af. Stat tile background #f0efe9, border #e5e5e5, text #333. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: The headline and subtext modality allows the narrative arc (launched, starred, extended) to read naturally. The three stat tiles give quantitative anchoring without resorting to a busy multi-stat panel. The warm off-white surface and left-anchored composition maintain Flywheel's editorial restraint while conveying genuine momentum.

concepts.headline: Open source moves fast.
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open source legal AI, hit 900 stars and 200 forks in 48 hours. Extensions are already live.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on #ffffff background. FLYWHEEL watermark centered behind all content at 150px bold uppercase, opacity 0.03. Primary statement 'Open source moves fast.' in Inter 58px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.04em, centered, color #111. Below it a 2px warm sand bar (#d7c8af) 64px wide centered, with 20px top and bottom margin. Subtext in Inter 17px weight 400 color #555, centered, max-width 480px. Bottom center: eyebrow label in DM Mono 11px 'MIKEOSS.COM' at #888. Canvas edges maintain 64px sacred padding. No decorative elements compete with the statement. Right and left margins are pure white, accounting for 60% total negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. Headline #111. Accent divider bar #d7c8af. Subtext #555. Eyebrow #888. Watermark #000000 at 0.03 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: A bold statement card distills the emotional core of the post: open source community velocity. The centered layout with FLYWHEEL watermark gives gravitas and editorial calm while the warm sand divider adds a signature brand detail without decoration excess.

selection_reasoning: The stat_callout concept best embodies Flywheel's principle of communicating through a single dominant focal point. The '900+' hero number in DM Mono at scale creates an immediate, visceral impression of momentum. The left-anchored hero pattern with particle dot network on the right is the most distinctive Flywheel signature composition, and the 65% negative space preserves the editorial restraint that defines the brand. The other concepts are strong but the stat callout is the most arresting and truest to Flywheel's premium publication aesthetic.
